name: Booking Field Extraction Gauntlet
summary: All 16 test steps passed. 7 bookings ingested successfully, ListBookings returned all 7 with correct types, all 7 field extractions returned accurate specific answers matching the source artifacts, and the negative test correctly refused to hallucinate.

test_steps.details: Trip 'Booking Gauntlet Trip' created with id 39f56fef-fa45-4f83-be17-0f251afd295d
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_FLIGHT. Confirmation code DL7829X, provider Delta Air Lines. detailsJson correctly parsed departure_terminal=4, arrival_terminal=1, flight_number=DL 472.
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL. Confirmation code HAB-2026-9831, provider Hotel Arts Barcelona. hotelDetails populated with check-in/check-out dates, room type, address.
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_ACTIVITY. Confirmation code SF-44921, provider GetYourGuide. activityDetails populated with meeting point, items to bring, date, time, duration.
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_CAR_RENTAL. Confirmation code R-8847321, provider Hertz. carRentalDetails with pickup/dropoff locations, times, car type.

Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL. Confirmation code VBH-20260601, provider Hostelworld. detailsJson correctly parsed all 3 properties (Hanoi, Hue, Saigon) with individual check-in/check-out dates and rates.
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_HOTEL. Confirmation code RYO-K-5521, provider Gion Nanba Ryokan. hotelDetails populated with room type, address, phone.
Ingested as BOOKING_TYPE_TOUR. Confirmation code OAXF-2026-112, provider SABORES DE OAXACA FOOD TOURS. tourDetails populated with stops, guide, meeting point, date, time, duration, price.
Returned 7 bookings. Types: TOUR(1), FLIGHT(1), HOTEL(3), ACTIVITY(1), CAR_RENTAL(1). All have non-empty id, rawSource, title, and correct type matching submission.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Flight: terminal and departure time
test_steps.question: What terminal and what time does my outbound flight depart?
test_steps.extracted_answer: Your outbound flight, DL 472, departs from Terminal 4 at 6:45 PM EDT.
test_steps.details: Correctly identified Terminal 4 and 6:45 PM EDT from the outbound flight section. Also included flight number DL 472 as bonus context.

test_steps.question: What is the cancellation policy?
test_steps.extracted_answer: Free cancellation is available until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). If you cancel after June 12, the first night (EUR 289.00) will be charged. In case of a no-show, the full stay will be charged.
test_steps.expected_info: Free cancellation until June 12, 2026 (11:59 PM CEST). After June 12: first night (EUR 289.00). No-show: full stay.
test_steps.details: All three tiers of the cancellation policy correctly extracted: free cancellation deadline, late cancellation penalty, and no-show charge.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Activity: meeting point and what to bring
test_steps.question: What is the meeting point and what should I bring?
test_steps.extracted_answer: The meeting point is at the Nativity Facade entrance (Carrer de la Marina side), address C/ de la Marina, 253, 08013 Barcelona. Look for the guide holding an orange "Barcelona Expert Tours" sign. Please arrive 15 minutes early. What to bring: Valid photo ID, comfortable walking shoes, sunscreen and water bottle, this confirmation, shoulders and knees must be covered.
test_steps.expected_info: Nativity Facade entrance, C/ de la Marina 253, Barcelona. Bring: photo ID, walking shoes, sunscreen, water bottle, confirmation, dress code (shoulders/knees covered).
test_steps.details: Meeting point with address, guide identification, and all 5 items to bring correctly extracted.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Car Rental: insurance and fuel policy
test_steps.question: What insurance is included and what is the fuel policy?
test_steps.extracted_answer: The included insurance consists of Super CDW (zero excess) and Theft Protection. The fuel policy is Full-to-Full.
test_steps.expected_info: Super CDW (zero excess) + Theft Protection. Fuel: Full-to-Full.
test_steps.details: Both insurance types (Super CDW with zero excess, Theft Protection) and Full-to-Full fuel policy correctly identified.

test_steps.question: What time is check-in at the Hanoi hostel?
test_steps.extracted_answer: Check-in at Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel is from 2:00 PM to 10:00 PM.
test_steps.expected_info: 2:00 PM - 10:00 PM at Hanoi Old Quarter Hostel
test_steps.details: Correctly disambiguated Hanoi hostel from the 3-property booking. Identified HANOI OLD QUARTER HOSTEL by name and provided the correct check-in window (2:00 PM - 10:00 PM). Did NOT confuse with Hue (1:00 PM - 11:00 PM) or Saigon (2:00 PM - midnight).

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Ryokan: meals and dinner time
test_steps.question: What meals are included and what time is dinner?
test_steps.extracted_answer: The meal plan includes Kaiseki Dinner and Traditional Japanese breakfast. The Kaiseki Dinner is served in-room at either 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM, with guests asked to confirm their preference at check-in.
test_steps.expected_info: Kaiseki Dinner (in-room, 6:00 PM or 6:30 PM) + Traditional Japanese breakfast (dining room, 7:30-9:00 AM).
test_steps.details: Both meals correctly identified. Dinner time options (6:00 PM or 6:30 PM) and in-room serving correctly noted.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Tour: tastings count and dietary accommodations
test_steps.question: How many food tastings are included and what dietary accommodations are available?
test_steps.extracted_answer: There are 12 food tastings included. Dietary accommodations available are vegetarian, gluten-free (with advance notice), and vegan substitutions for most stops. Guests must notify the tour operator of any allergies or dietary restrictions at least 48 hours before the tour.
test_steps.expected_info: 12 tastings. Dietary: vegetarian, gluten-free (advance notice), vegan substitutions for most stops. 48-hour advance notice required.
test_steps.details: Correct count of 12 tastings. All three dietary options (vegetarian, gluten-free, vegan) correctly identified with the 48-hour notice requirement.

test_steps.action: ExtractBookingField - Negative test: irrelevant question on flight booking
test_steps.question: What is the hotel wifi password?
test_steps.extracted_answer: I am sorry, but the provided booking confirmation is for a flight and does not contain any information about a hotel or its wifi password.
test_steps.expected_behavior: AI should indicate information is not available in the flight confirmation, NOT hallucinate.
test_steps.details: AI correctly identified this is a flight booking, not a hotel booking, and refused to fabricate information. No hallucination detected.

score_justification.ingestion_accuracy: All 7 artifacts ingested with correct types, confirmation codes, providers, and structured detailsJson. Multi-property hostel booking correctly decomposed into 3 property objects.
score_justification.field_extraction_accuracy: All 7 extraction questions returned specific, accurate answers that exactly match the source artifacts. No vague non-answers, no generic advice.
score_justification.multi_property_disambiguation: Hostel extraction correctly isolated Hanoi-specific check-in time (2:00 PM - 10:00 PM) without confusing it with Hue (1:00 PM - 11:00 PM) or Saigon (2:00 PM - midnight).
score_justification.hallucination_resistance: Negative test passed cleanly. AI recognized the booking type mismatch and refused to fabricate hotel information from a flight confirmation.
score_justification.type_classification: ListBookings returned all 7 bookings with types matching submission: FLIGHT(1), HOTEL(3), ACTIVITY(1), CAR_RENTAL(1), TOUR(1).
score_justification.overall: Perfect score across all 17 test steps. Zero bugs, zero UX issues, zero AI behavior issues. Booking pipeline is robust.

regression_baseline.hotel_cancellation_policy: Free until June 12; after: EUR 289 first night; no-show: full stay
regression_baseline.activity_meeting_point: Nativity Facade entrance, C/ de la Marina 253, Barcelona
regression_baseline.activity_what_to_bring: Photo ID, walking shoes, sunscreen, water bottle, confirmation, dress code
regression_baseline.negative_test_response: Correctly refused; identified booking type mismatch
